description: You are a GIS Technologist at a county government agency. Configure security in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/, admin/Admin123!) to allow field technicians to edit spatial data in the 'ne' workspace. Create a security role named 'map_editor' and a user account 'editor1' (password 'Editor@2024!') assigned to this role. Establish a layer security access rule for all layers in the 'ne' workspace granting write access to both the 'map_editor' and 'ROLE_ADMINISTRATOR' roles.
